title: 6 months of SubHub credit
blurb: Join an eligible Optus Choice Plus plan and get $10/mth SubHub credit to spend across Netflix, Paramount+ and more.

title: $300 off iPhone 16 Pro
blurb: Save $300 over 36 months when you pair iPhone 16 Pro with an Optus Choice Premium plan.

title: First month free on 5G Home
blurb: Get your first month free on Optus 5G Home Internet. Self-install in minutes, no lock-in contract.

title: Optus Sport included
blurb: Stream the Premier League, LaLiga and the Matildas — included on all eligible Optus postpaid plans.

title: Bonus 30GB on prepaid
blurb: Recharge an Epic Value $40 for the first time and get a bonus 30GB on your first recharge.

title: Save $10/mth on a 2nd plan
blurb: Add a second eligible Choice plan to your account and save $10 per month on it, ongoing.
